name: Lady Gaga
description: Pop provocateur, piano prodigy, and one-name superstar — from 'Just Dance' to 'A Star Is Born'.

questions.q: What is Lady Gaga's real first name?

source.notes: Full name: Stefani Joanne Angelina Germanotta.

questions.q: In what year was Lady Gaga born?

source.notes: Born March 28, 1986.

questions.q: Which New York City borough was Lady Gaga born in?

source.notes: Born at Lenox Hill Hospital on the Upper East Side; raised in Manhattan.

questions.q: Which musical instrument has Lady Gaga played since childhood?

source.notes: Self-taught from age 4; trained classically as a teenager.

questions.q: In what year did Lady Gaga release her debut album 'The Fame'?

source.notes: Released August 19, 2008 (US).

questions.q: On which Lady Gaga album does the song 'Just Dance' appear?

source.notes: Lead single from her debut album.

questions.q: Which Lady Gaga album won the Grammy for Best Dance/Electronica Album?

source.notes: Won at the 52nd Annual Grammy Awards (2010).

questions.q: What did Lady Gaga arrive in at the 2011 Grammy Awards red carpet?

source.notes: Carried in a vessel/'egg' she described as the gestation space for her then-upcoming 'Born This Way' performance.

questions.q: Who featured with Lady Gaga on the 2010 single 'Telephone'?

source.notes: From The Fame Monster; the music video was a sequel to Beyoncé's 'Video Phone'.

questions.q: In what year did Lady Gaga release the single 'Born This Way'?

source.notes: Single released February 11, 2011; album followed in May.

questions.q: Whose duets does Lady Gaga's 2014 album 'Cheek to Cheek' showcase?

source.notes: A jazz-standards collaboration; won the Grammy for Best Traditional Pop Vocal Album.

questions.q: Which 'South Park' character famously sings 'Poker Face' on the show?

source.notes: Cartman's rendition appears in 'Whale Whores' (Season 13).

questions.q: Which religious figure did Lady Gaga portray in the music video for 'Judas'?

source.notes: Original answer mis-spelled 'Mary Magdalene'.

questions.q: What did Lady Gaga famously wear on her head in the 'Poker Face' music video?
choices: A bow made of her own hair

source.notes: The 'hair bow' became one of her signature early-career looks.

questions.q: Who was the first record label to sign Lady Gaga?

source.notes: Signed at 19; dropped after about three months. Later signed to Interscope's Streamline.

questions.q: On which album does Lady Gaga's ballad 'Speechless' first appear?

source.notes: Track 4 on the 8-track 2009 reissue/EP.

questions.q: Who did Lady Gaga perform with in The Lonely Island's '3-Way (The Golden Rule)' on SNL?

source.notes: 2011 Lonely Island Digital Short; Gaga delivers the 'Mother Lover' bridge.

questions.q: What character did Lady Gaga play in the 2013 film 'Machete Kills'?

source.notes: A shape-shifting assassin in Robert Rodriguez's 'Machete Kills'.

questions.q: How many siblings does Lady Gaga have?

source.notes: One younger sister, Natali Germanotta — a fashion designer.

questions.q: Which Lady Gaga song did the cast of 'Glee' perform in a 2011 episode?

source.notes: From the Season 2 episode also titled 'Born This Way'.
